mapper.insert: insert into app.notification (user_id, title, content, type, is_read, related_url) values (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{read}, #{relatedUrl})
mapper.select: select count(1) from app.notification where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0
mapper.update: update app.notification set is_read = 1 where id = #{id}
update app.notification set is_read = 1 where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = 0
